_Logo & Brand Identity Guidelines_

The Meridian · June 2026

| **Company**<br><br>Veredian | **Domain**<br><br>veredian.ai | **Version**<br><br>2.0 - June 2026 |
| --------------------------- | ----------------------------- | ---------------------------------- |

# **1\. The Meridian - Concept & Meaning**

The Veredian logo is called The Meridian. It is a globe with prime meridian, equator arc, and latitude lines, with a bold V chevron inside. Every element carries specific meaning - nothing is decorative.

| **Element**            | **Meaning**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **The Globe**          | Sovereign reach is global, not regional. Every government with critical infrastructure is a potential deployment. The globe communicates this without words.                                                                                                                    |
| **The Meridian Lines** | The prime meridian and latitude arcs give the globe precision and depth. Meridians are instruments of navigation and exact positioning - appropriate for silicon that must perform exactly, every time.                                                                         |
| **The V Chevron**      | Three meanings simultaneously: V for Veredian (brand initial), an upward-pointing signal arrow (AI inference, data flow, direction), and the first letter of the word "Meridian" embedded in the name VeREDIAN. The V is always the dominant foreground element.                |
| **The Name**           | "Veredian" contains the word "meridian." The globe mark is etymologically correct - it is a direct reference to the name itself, not a generic tech globe.                                                                                                                      |
| **Teal Color**         | #00A89D - sovereign, technical, and distinctive. Not the cyan of a consumer tech company, not the green of a sustainability brand. The exact hue of precision instrumentation. The wordmark is rendered entirely in teal - a deliberate choice: the company name is the signal. |
| **Navy Background**    | #0A1628 - the depth of a secure operations room, not a startup's midnight blue. Authority without aggression.                                                                                                                                                                   |

# **2\. Logo Variants**

The Veredian logo system has seven variants. Each is designed for a specific application context. Use the correct variant for each context - do not substitute one for another.

## **2.1 Primary Lockup - Horizontal**

The primary logo. Used on: website investor page, pitch deck cover, printed collateral, and any standalone branded context. Single-line wordmark VEREDIAN in sovereign teal. Globe mark left, wordmark right.

| ![On dark navy (#0A1628)](data:image/png;base64,)<br><br>_On dark navy (#0A1628)_ | ![On white (#FFFFFF)](data:image/png;base64,)<br><br>_On white (#FFFFFF)_ |

## **2.2 Compact Lockup - Single Line**

The navigation bar logo. Used on: website nav bar, email signatures, and social media headers. Tighter proportions, same mark.

| ![On dark navy - nav bar use](data:image/png;base64,)<br><br>_On dark navy - nav bar use_ | ![On white - light header use](data:image/png;base64,)<br><br>_On white - light header use_ |

## **2.3 Full Brand Lockup - With Tagline**

The full brand statement. Used on: pitch deck cover slide, conference stands, letterhead, and press materials. Wordmark above a thin rule, tagline "SOVEREIGN EDGE AI VISION SILICON" below.

![Full brand lockup - pitch deck cover, letterhead, conference](data:image/png;base64,)

_Full brand lockup - pitch deck cover, letterhead, conference_

## **2.4 Standalone Icon Mark**

The Meridian globe mark without wordmark. Used on: favicon, app icon, social media avatar, hardware emboss on chip package, and any context where the wordmark is already present nearby.

_At 16px (favicon) the globe lines reduce to prime meridian + V only. The mark remains recognisable at this size._

Solid-fill versions for social media avatar (400×400px), printed collateral, and embossed chip packaging.

# **3\. Color Specification**

The logo uses three colors only. No other colors are permitted in any logo variant.

| **Color**          | **Hex** | **RGB**             | **CMYK**              | **Pantone**    | **Usage**                                                                                    |
| ------------------ | ------- | ------------------- | --------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Sovereign Teal** | #00A89D | RGB 0 / 168 / 157   | CMYK 100 / 0 / 6 / 34 | Pantone 7716 C | Primary wordmark color - entire VEREDIAN wordmark, globe stroke, V chevron, filled icon fill |
| **Primary Navy**   | #0A1628 | RGB 10 / 22 / 40    | CMYK 75 / 45 / 0 / 84 | Pantone 5395 C | Primary background - dark lockup backgrounds, navy fill icon                                 |
| **White**          | #FFFFFF | RGB 255 / 255 / 255 | CMYK 0 / 0 / 0 / 0    | Paper white    | Light background wordmark and reversed-out applications                                      |

**Color discipline**

The teal (#00A89D) must be reproduced exactly. In print, request Pantone 7716 C as a spot color for maximum accuracy.

The navy (#0A1628) is not pure black - it has distinct blue-green undertones. Do not substitute #000000.

The wordmark VEREDIAN is rendered entirely in teal across all color variants. This is a deliberate design decision - do not change the wordmark to white or navy on dark backgrounds.

# **4\. Typography in the Logo**

| **Element**               | **Typeface**     | **Weight**    | **Treatment**                                            |
| ------------------------- | ---------------- | ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| **VEREDIAN wordmark**     | Barlow Condensed | 800 ExtraBold | All-caps · letter-spacing 2pt · sovereign teal #00A89D   |
| **Tagline (full lockup)** | Inter            | 500 Medium    | All-caps · letter-spacing 5pt · silver #A8B4C0 · 13-14px |

The wordmark in production logo files is outlined vector paths, not live text. Do not attempt to recreate the wordmark by typing in Barlow Condensed - use the supplied files.

# **5\. Sizing & Clearspace**

## **5.1 Minimum Sizes**

| **Variant**              | **Minimum Size**                         | **Note**                                              |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| **Primary lockup**       | 180px wide (digital) · 45mm wide (print) | Below this the globe mark becomes illegible           |
| **Compact lockup**       | 120px wide (digital) · 30mm wide (print) | Below this the globe mark and wordmark merge visually |
| **Standalone icon mark** | 24px wide (digital) · 8mm wide (print)   | Below 24px use favicon-optimised version              |
| **Filled icon**          | 48px wide (digital) · 12mm wide (print)  | Minimum for the filled circular mark                  |

## **5.2 Clearspace Rule**

**Clearspace = 1× the height of the icon mark on all four sides**

For the primary lockup: measure the globe mark height (H). Maintain H of clear space above, below, left, and right of the full lockup.

For the standalone icon: maintain 0.5× icon diameter as clearspace on all sides.

## **5.3 Logo on Backgrounds**

| **Dark navy #0A1628**  | ✓ Primary - dark variant                                       |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **White #FFFFFF**      | ✓ Primary - light variant                                      |
| **Light gray #F0F4F8** | ✓ Acceptable - light variant                                   |
| **Teal #00A89D**       | ✕ Never - the teal wordmark disappears into the background     |
| **Mid-tone gray/blue** | △ Test contrast - minimum 4.5:1 required                       |
| **Photographic image** | △ Use with caution - place on a solid color panel              |
| **Any gradient**       | ✕ Never - the logo must always sit on a solid color background |

# **6\. Usage - Approved & Prohibited**

## **6.1 Approved Usage**

✓ Use the supplied SVG and PNG files - do not recreate the logo

✓ Maintain exact color values - #00A89D teal, #0A1628 navy, #FFFFFF white

✓ Scale proportionally - always maintain the aspect ratio of the supplied files

✓ The wordmark VEREDIAN is always teal (#00A89D) - dark and light variants differ only in the globe mark background

✓ Use the standalone icon mark where the wordmark appears nearby in the same layout

✓ Use the filled teal icon for social media avatars (400×400px PNG at 3× = 1200×1200px)

✓ Use the monochrome white variant for foil, emboss, and single-color dark print

✓ Use the monochrome navy variant for single-color light print and letterhead

## **6.2 Prohibited Usage**

✕ Do not recreate the logo by typing the name - always use the supplied files

✕ Do not change the wordmark color to white or navy - VEREDIAN is always teal

✕ Do not stretch, compress, skew, rotate, or distort the logo

✕ Do not add drop shadows, glows, gradients, outlines, or effects

✕ Do not place on a gradient, photographic, or patterned background without a solid backing

✕ Do not place on a teal (#00A89D) background - the wordmark disappears

✕ Do not separate the wordmark from the icon mark (except standalone icon use cases)

✕ Do not use the full brand lockup with tagline in the navigation bar - use the compact variant

✕ Do not animate the logo unless specifically approved

# **7\. File Formats & Asset Delivery**

| **File**                           | **Variant**                   | **Primary Use**                          |
| ---------------------------------- | ----------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| **01_primary_dark.svg / .png**     | Primary lockup · dark         | Website, investor deck, print (dark bg)  |
| **02_primary_light.svg / .png**    | Primary lockup · light        | Website, press kit, print (light bg)     |
| **03_compact_dark.svg / .png**     | Compact lockup · dark         | Navigation bar, email signature          |
| **04_compact_light.svg / .png**    | Compact lockup · light        | Light nav bar, white email header        |
| **05_full_brand_dark.svg / .png**  | Full brand lockup · dark      | Pitch deck cover, letterhead, conference |
| **06_icon_transparent.svg / .png** | Standalone icon · transparent | Any background application               |
| **07_icon_dark.svg / .png**        | Standalone icon · dark        | Favicon, app icon, hardware emboss       |
| **09_icon_filled_teal.svg / .png** | Filled teal circle            | LinkedIn: veredian.ai company avatar     |
| **10_icon_filled_navy.svg / .png** | Filled navy circle            | Light background circular applications   |
| **11_mono_white.svg / .png**       | Monochrome white              | Foil, emboss, single-color dark print    |
| **12_mono_navy.svg / .png**        | Monochrome navy               | Single-color light print, letterhead     |
| **13_favicon.svg**                 | Favicon optimised             | Convert to .ico: 16, 32, 48px variants   |

# **8\. Relationship with Product Brand**

| **Element**            | **Rule**                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Veredian (company)** | Company identity - all company materials: website, investor deck, business cards, letterhead, LinkedIn.                                                                            |
| **EDGE-VISION™ 1000**  | Product name only - not a logo. Set in standard body typeface. The ™ symbol must appear on first use on every page or document. Never create a separate logo for the product name. |
| **Together**           | On product pages and datasheets: Veredian logo at top, EDGE-VISION™ 1000 as a heading below. The company logo is always primary.                                                   |

**Domain & contact**

Company website: veredian.ai

General enquiries: <hello@veredian.ai>

Investor relations: <investors@veredian.ai>

Careers: <careers@veredian.ai>

_VEREDIAN.AI · LOGO & BRAND IDENTITY GUIDELINES · JUNE 2026_
